entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Field-grown legume Cajanus cajan (L.) Millsp. used as a host for nematodes

entities.name: HETERODERA CAJANI
entities.description: A plant-parasitic nematode predominant in vertisol soils

entities.name: ROTYLENCHULUS RENIFORMIS
entities.description: A plant-parasitic nematode predominant in alfisol soils

entities.name: PLANT-PARASITIC NEMATODES
entities.description: Group of nematodes that associate with and parasitize field-grown pigeonpea

entities.name: HOPLOLAIMUS SEINHORSTI
entities.description: A plant-parasitic nematode found in alfisol and vertisol soils

entities.name: HELICOTYLENCHUS RETUSUS
entities.description: A plant-parasitic nematode found in vertisol soils

entities.name: PRATYLENCHUS ZEAE
entities.description: A plant-parasitic nematode whose population declines with sampling depth

entities.name: ALFISOLS
entities.description: A type of soil where R. reniformis is predominant

entities.name: VERTISOLS
entities.description: A type of soil where H. cajani is predominant

entities.name: SPATIAL AND TEMPORAL DISTRIBUTION
entities.description: The monitoring of nematode populations over time and at different soil depths

entities.name: SUMMER FALLOW
entities.description: Agricultural practice of leaving land unseeded from February to June to reduce nematode populations

entities.name: SAMPLING DEPTH
entities.description: The vertical measurement in soil where nematode populations are monitored
